sections.title: Identity and Access (Azure AD / Entra ID)

items.title: MFA enforced for privileged roles
items.desc: Require MFA for Global Admin, Security Admin, and privileged roles.

items.title: Conditional Access policies
items.desc: Block legacy auth, require compliant devices, and restrict risky sign-ins.

items.title: Guest user access restricted
items.desc: Limit external collaboration and review guest permissions regularly.

items.title: Service principal credential rotation
items.desc: Rotate client secrets and certificates; prefer managed identities.

items.title: PIM for just-in-time admin
items.desc: Use Privileged Identity Management for standing admin access.

items.title: NSG rules not over-permissive
items.desc: No 0.0.0.0/0 on RDP, SSH, SQL, or management ports.

items.title: VNet flow logs enabled
items.desc: Enable NSG flow logs and traffic analytics for visibility.

items.title: Private endpoints for PaaS
items.desc: Use private link for storage, SQL, and Key Vault where possible.

items.title: Azure Firewall or WAF in front of apps
items.desc: Protect public-facing apps with WAF and centralized egress control.

items.title: DDoS Protection Standard
items.desc: Enable on production VNets serving internet-facing workloads.

items.title: Storage account public access disabled
items.desc: Disable anonymous blob access and review network rules.

items.title: Encryption at rest with CMK
items.desc: Use customer-managed keys for storage and databases where required.

items.title: SQL TDE and auditing enabled
items.desc: Transparent encryption plus audit logs to Log Analytics.

items.title: SQL firewall not open to internet
items.desc: Restrict database access to known IPs or private endpoints.

items.title: Soft delete and versioning on storage
items.desc: Protect against ransomware and accidental deletion.

items.title: VM disk encryption enabled
items.desc: Azure Disk Encryption or server-side encryption for all VMs.

items.title: AKS RBAC and private cluster
items.desc: Enable Azure RBAC, private API server, and network policies.

items.title: Managed identity over secrets
items.desc: Apps and functions use managed identities instead of stored creds.

items.title: Defender for Cloud enabled
items.desc: Turn on Defender plans for servers, containers, and databases.

items.title: Patch management baseline
items.desc: Use Update Management or Automanage for timely patching.

items.title: Activity Log to Log Analytics
items.desc: Centralize subscription activity and resource logs.

items.title: Diagnostic settings on all resources
items.desc: Export metrics and logs for critical resources.

items.title: Key Vault purge protection
items.desc: Enable soft delete and purge protection on production vaults.

items.title: Key rotation policy
items.desc: Automate rotation for keys and secrets in Key Vault.

items.title: Alert rules for security events
items.desc: Alert on failed logins, key deletions, and NSG changes.
